acceptance_targets: [chapter_15_f02] PASS if, after revision, no more than two of the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:379, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:473 still use the same clipped negation formula, and each revised passage reads as grammatically complete prose rather than a fragment stack; FAIL if three or more of those marked passages still hinge on the same 'Not X' construction.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, after revision, no more than two of the cited beats at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:379, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:473 still use the same clipped negation formula, and each revised passage reads as grammatically complete prose rather than a fragment stack; FAIL if three or more of those marked passages still hinge on the same 'Not X' construction.
findings.evidence: The narration repeats the same clipped negation/contrast construction at snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:183, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:379, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:473.
findings.problem: The repeated 'Not X. [replacement].' fragment rhythm has become a chapter-level tic. By the second half it starts flattening moments that should feel distinct, and it brushes against the constitution's ban on clipped narration: instead of sounding compressed by pressure, the prose begins to sound mechanically pre-compressed in the same way every time.
findings.rewrite_direction: At snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:35, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:109, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:165, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:235, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:379, snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:421, and snapshots/cycle_01/chapters/chapter_15.md:473, keep only the strongest one or two clipped reversals and rewrite the rest into full, scene-specific syntax. Let some turns land through bodily action, some through longer carried thought, and some through dialogue so the chapter stops resolving pressure with one repeated sentence shape.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into the contradiction that tenderness can coexist with surveillance, desire with betrayal, and ideology with vanity. Render violence, sex, illness, and poverty at the scale characters actually experience them. When an edge case appears, choose the more specific and less reputationally safe version if it remains faithful to character, period, and causality.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If a scene reaches bodily danger, sex, grief, class shame, or political cruelty and then retreats into summary, rewrite toward the exact physical and social fact the character cannot evade.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: Moderate to high; contractions are the spoken default, with full forms reserved for period formality, deliberate emphasis, or Vautrin's cultivated precision.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Alternate compressive surveillance chapters with slower communal or reflective chapters; vary scene count, dialogue density, and whether the turn comes from action, information, dread, or aftermath so no two adjacent chapters run on the same structural rhythm.
prose_style_profile.diction: Historically grounded and unsentimental; plain enough for labor and bureaucracy, lyrical only when perception earns it rather than rhetoric.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third centered on Elise, elastic enough to register class texture, political pressure, and the quarry's collective life without drifting into authorial essay.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Supple, image-bearing sentences broken by hard factual beats at moments of violence, lust, bureaucratic coercion, or shame.
